ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2022 Continued To Mar-14-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing; Declaration Of Kambrie L. Keith In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:22:02 a.m. and concluding at 09:25:07 a.m.

Plaintiff American Express National Bank represented by Kambrie L. Keith, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Jordan K. Archer AKA Jordan Archer not appearing.

ROBERT REBHAN is placed under oath.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents offer of proof.
ROBERT REBHAN is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff's witness and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff American Express National Bank, and against Defendant Jordan K. Archer AKA Jordan Archer, as follows:

1. Principal: $20,455.78
2. Costs: $252.53

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $20,708.31

Proposed judgment to be submitted.
